rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE WALTER COLEMAN TESTAMENTARY TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Distribution Of Trust Assets
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1) Petitioner requests distribution of estate assets in this trust proceeding. 2) Memo of points and authorities cited Probate Code 850, but the petition was not brought under that code section, and it is unclear who would have standing to bring an 850 petition. 3) It is unclear whether Lynshasa Lumpkin's interest vested prior to her death. 4) There is currently no serving trustee. 5) No notice has been given, and it is unclear who is entitled to notice.
